title: Results that depend on random number generation should be reproducible
description: This rule checks for uses of non-deterministic random number generation. Non-deterministic random number generation can lead to unpredictable behavior and may make it impossible to reproduce the results of a program.
message: A non-deterministic random number generator is used.
recommendation: Use deterministic random number generators or seed the random number generator.

compliant.code:
import random
seed = 42
random.seed(seed)
result = random.random()

why_is_this_an_issue: Non-deterministic random number generation can lead to unpredictable behavior and may make it impossible to reproduce the results of a program.
how_to_fix: Use deterministic random number generators or seed the random number generator.

metadata.title: Results that depend on random number generation should be reproducible
